upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tvAmihEkAkinIM dfzwvA nirjane gahane vane prArTayizyanti rAjAnaH' (BA0 u0 17611) atra praSabdo viSezakfnna prArTayizyanti (=prArTayizyante) ityarTayizyante kAmayizyante varayizyanta ityevAha
'nyagroDasya tataH SAKAM prArTayAmAsa BArata sannipatya tu SAKAyAM nyagroDasya vihaNgamaH' (BA0 sO0 139-40) atra prArTayatirmfgayaRe vicayane vartate
'yo na Sakyo balAtkarturdevErapi savAsavEH taM tvaM prArTayase manda bAlaScandramasaM yaTA' (BA0 u0 13037) prArTayase grahItumicCasItyarTaH
'kzamate na janaM tvadarpitaM yaminAmindra ripustu hiMsitum SaSinaM mfgaSatrurASritaM na mfgaM prArTayate hi jAtucit' (jA0 ha0 423) iha prArTayatirAskandane AkramaRe vartate
'kimapekzya PalaM payoDarAnDvanataH prArTayate mfgADipaH' (ki0 221) aBiyAti utplavata ityarTaH
'yadiSabdaH pratibadDo viDAyako'nuvAdaM prArTayate' (lO0 gf0 sU0 124 devapAlaH) prArTayata AkANkzati apekzata iti vA
'svayaM tvahaM prArTaye tatra gantum' (BA0 u0 2947) prArTaye=icCAmi
'na ca prArTayate kaScinmanasApi vasunDarAm' (=kosalarAjyam) (rA0 28823) na prArTayate AkramituM necCati
'svajaneByaH sUtavinASakAraRaM SrutvA taTEva samarTitavAn' (paYcata॰) tattaTEvetyaByupagatavAn ityarTaH
'mama vfttaM ca SIlaM ca tena sarvaM samarTitam' (rA॰6.101.17) samarTitaM vimfzwam sADvAlocitam
'yaTA mantriBiH saha samarTitaM taTA pariRamati' (svapna॰1) samarTitam=mantritam
'samarTanAsu sarvAsu hitaM ca priyameva ca' (BA॰vi॰4.24) samarTanAsu kAryAkAryaparIkzAsu
'samarTanAM me pfzwA tvaM prayacCa SucilApini' (hari॰2.92.43) samarTanAm=kAryaGawanopAyam
'etasminnASrame vAsaM ciraM tu na samarTaye' (rA0 3721) na samarTaye necCAmi

'pratyarTayata rAGavam' (Bawwi0 625) pratyarTinaM kuruteti jayamaNgalA tatkaroti tadAcazwa iti Ric arTayatestu nityamAtmanepaditvAtpratyarTayaDvamiti syAt AScaryaM mfgapotaH kesarikiSorakaM pratyarTayizyate aBiyAsyati AkramizyatItyarTaH
'bahupratyarTikaM hyetadrAjyaM nAma kurUdvaha' (BA0 ASrama0 3612) pratyarTI viroDI viroDibahulamityarTaH
'aparANmuKatArTiByaH pratyarTiByo viSezataH' (skanda0 pu0 kA0 41943) pratyarTinaH paripanTino dvizantaH
